course.name: The Ultimate Next.js Series
course.heading: Everything you need to build fast, full-stack web apps with Next.js 13+ (App Router) and TypeScript
course.description:
The Ultimate Next.js Series is your complete guide to building modern, full-stack applications with Next.js 13+ (App Router) and TypeScript. In this project-based Next.js course, you’ll build and deploy a production-grade issue tracker —— packed with real-world features like dashboards, filtering, sorting, pagination, forms, authentication, modal boxes, toast notifications, and more.

By the end, you’ll have a **polished, fast, responsive, fully functioning app in the cloud** that you can share with friends or potential employers to help you land your dream job. We’ll use a modern tech stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Radix UI, Prisma, and Next Auth.

I’ll walk you through every line of code, helping you understand how to structure full-stack projects, write clean, scalable code, and build apps like a seasoned developer.

As always, this course is **clear, concise, comprehensive, well-organized, and practical** — ideal if you want to learn Next.js by building a real, full-stack web app from scratch.
outcomes: Confidently build full-stack apps with Next.js 13+ and TypeScript
Style Next.js applications with Tailwind or CSS modules
Implement routing and navigation using the new App router
Use Prisma to integrate your Next.js apps with a database
Optimize your apps for performance and SEO
Use VSCode shortcuts to increase your productivity
Apply the latest techniques and best practices
audience: Web developers seeking to master Next.js 13+ and TypeScript for full-stack app development
Frontend devs looking to explore full-stack development with Next.js.
Next.js developers looking to fill in knowledge gaps and solidify their expertise

text: You don't need prior knowledge of Next.js to take this course. However, you should have some basic knowledge of React and TypeScript.

projects: In this course, we’ll create and deploy a professional, full-stack issue tracker with all the features you’d expect in a modern app: a dashboard with charts, filtering, sorting, pagination, forms with client-side validation, user authentication, modal dialogs, toast notifications, and much more. By the end, you’ll have a fast, responsive, fully functional app in the cloud to showcase to potential employers. We’ll build this using a powerful tech stack—**Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Radix UI, Prisma**, and **Next Auth**—to prepare you for building modern applications. Get a sneak peek of this app in the course trailer video on this page.

cta.heading: Want to Stand Out as a React Developer? Learn Next.js.
cta.description: Next.js is the go-to framework for modern web development, used by big companies like Netflix, TikTok, and Twitch to build fast, scalable apps. This structured, hands-on course teaches you Next.js the right way—fast. No fluff, just real-world coding skills to help you get ahead. Start learning today and take your React skills to the next level.

seo.title: Next.js Course – Build Full-Stack Apps with Next.js 13+ and TypeScript
seo.description: Learn Next.js 13+ by building a full-stack app with TypeScript, Tailwind, Prisma, and more. This project-based Next.js course covers everything from routing to deployment.
